title: Bogus upgrade screen pops up every time I open a board
excerpt: For the last 2 days every time  I open a board from my Favorites sidebar this screen flashes on in the main body of the screen where the board should be, saying that I should upgrade from Pro to Standard. Huh?? That’s no…

posts.author: lpblue (Linda Phillips Blue)
posts.cookedHtml: For the last 2 days every time I open a board from my Favorites sidebar this screen flashes on in the main body of the screen where the board should be, saying that I should upgrade from Pro to Standard. Huh?? That’s not an upgrade. It doesn’t stay there long but it’s annoying, delaying opening the board I want to get to. Can I attach a screenshot here?
